title: Synspunkt: Den anden AI-boble og den nødvendige landing af hypen
summary: Mens der i disse tider er mange bekymringer om en mulig finansiel AI-boble, argumenterer dette synspunkt for en helt anden form for AI-boble – og forklarer hvorfor, vi har brug for at få den til at briste.
explanation: Nyhedens indhold er en generel kommentar om AI-hype uden konkrete danske mål eller sikkerhedsincidenter, hvilket ikke opfylder kriterierne for dansk relevans.

title: Europol-led crackdown on The Com hackers leads to 30 arrests
summary: A yearlong Europol-coordinated operation dubbed "Project Compass" has led to 30 arrests and 179 suspects being tied to "The Com," an online cybercrime collective that targets children and teenagers. [...]

title: CISA warns that RESURGE malware can be dormant on Ivanti devices
summary: The U.S. Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) has released new details about RESURGE, a malicious implant used in zero-day attacks exploiting CVE-2025-0282 to breach Ivanti Connect Secure devices. [...]

title: 900+ Sangoma FreePBX Instances Compromised in Ongoing Web Shell Attacks
summary:
The Shadowserver Foundation has revealed that over 900 Sangoma FreePBX instances still remain infected with web shells as part of attacks that exploited a command injection vulnerability starting in December 2025.
Of these, 401 instances are located in the U.S., followed by 51 in Brazil, 43 in Canada, 40 in Germany, and 36 in France.
The non-profit entity said the compromises are likely
explanation: Nyhedens rapport angiver ikke, at nogen danske virksomheder eller infrastruktur er blandt de 900 kompromitterede instanser, hvilket gør det usikkert, at Danmark er direkte ramt.

title: Malicious Go Crypto Module Steals Passwords, Deploys Rekoobe Backdoor
summary:
Cybersecurity researchers have disclosed details of a malicious Go module that's designed to harvest passwords, create persistent access via SSH, and deliver a Linux backdoor named Rekoobe.
The Go module, github[.]com/xinfeisoft/crypto, impersonates the legitimate "golang.org/x/crypto" codebase, but injects malicious code that's responsible for exfiltrating secrets entered via terminal password
explanation: Nyhedens indhold nævner ikke konkrete danske virksomheder, infrastruktur eller data, og er en generel beskrivelse af en global malware-udvikling uden specifikke danske ofre.
